task.name: ACME AG receives invoices
Secretariat performs invoice's visual inspection
Secretariat forwards the invoice to an accounting employee
Accounting employee identifies the charging suppliers
Accounting employee creates a new invoice
Accounting employee checks the invoice items
Accounting employee notes the cost center and the cost center managers (docket)
Accounting employee sends the docket and the invoice copy to the cost center manager
Cost center manager reviews the content for accuracy
Cost center manager notes his code one on the docket (AP)
Cost center manager returns the copy of the invoice
Pass the copy of the invoice to the next cost center manager
Cost center manager sends invoice back to accounting
Accounting employee proceedes with the clarification with the vendor
Accounting employee consults the cost center managers
Accounting employee sends the copy of the invoice to the cost center managers
Accounting employee forwards the copy of the invoice to the commercial manager
Commercial manager makes the commercial audit
Commercial manager issues the approval for payment
Board checks invoice
Commercial manager moves invoice's copy and the docket to the accounting employee
Accounting employee resolves complaint
Accounting employee gives payment instructions
Accounting employee closes the invoice
Docket and the invoice's copy go to the internal mail
Cost center manager receives the copy of the invoice
Cost center manager rejects the AP
